modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Foxit license activation issue on Windows computer

full_description_text: I lost access to Foxit on my computer after something was done to it. Now, it keeps prompting me to activate the license, and I don't know how to get it back. This is really frustrating because I need to use Foxit for my work.
short_description: Foxit license activation issue on Windows computer
description: I lost access to Foxit on my computer after something was done to it. Now, it keeps prompting me to activate the license, and I don't know how to get it back. This is really frustrating because I need to use Foxit for my work.
